name: CROSS TIMBERS ROYALTY TRUST
summary: Cross Timbers Royalty Trust (CRT) is a royalty trust. Based on this filing excerpt, which is primarily a consent letter from petroleum engineering firm Miller and Lents, Ltd. authorizing use of their reserve report in CRT's Form 10-K, limited operational detail is provided. The trust is administered by XTO Energy Inc. and files annual reports with the SEC regarding its royalty interests.

partnerships.description: Texas registered engineering firm providing reserve reports for CRT's annual SEC filings.
XTO Energy administers CRT and files the trust's Annual Report on Form 10-K with the SEC.

origin.chain: SEC.gov PEM → origin.rootz.global extraction → GitHub mirror
